news.t: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
Small-cap ETFs went on a wild ride. Can they regain momentum after Trump takes office?
Simplify Introduces China A Shares Plus Income ETF (CAS), Providing A Share Exposure With Options Overlay Designed to Deliver Additional Income

holdings.infoBox: CAS is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Simplify China A Shares PLUS Income ETF (CAS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation and income by investing in China A shares and similar instruments, with no limit on market capitalization. The actively managed ETF also employs various option writing strategies for additional income. CAS was launched on Jan 13, 2025 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: Small-cap ETFs went on a wild ride. Can they regain momentum after Trump takes office?
data.text: Small-cap ETFs have been on a roller-coaster ride in the first two weeks of the new year.

data.title: Simplify Introduces China A Shares Plus Income ETF (CAS), Providing A Share Exposure With Options Overlay Designed to Deliver Additional Income
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify launches CAS, active ETF seeking capital appreciation while providing income via exposure to mainland Chinese equities via options overlay.
